{{Relic Infobox|Sere Talon|2}} {{Small Card Infobox|Wish|2}}
{{R|Sere Talon||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. It adds 3 copies of {{C|Wish|Wish|2}} to the player's deck as well as 2 random {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curses|2}}. The {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curses|2}} added will never include {{C|Ascender's Bane||2}}, {{C|Bad Luck||2}}, {{C|Curse of the Bell||2}}, {{C|Enthralled||2}}, {{C|Folly||2}}, {{C|Greed||2}}, {{C|Poor Sleep||2}}, or {{C|Spore Mind||2}}.


== Sources ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}}, '''Sere Talon''' can be offered by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Preserved Fog''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Distinguished Cape||2}} and {{R|Preserved Fog||2}}, only 1 of the 3 can be offered by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Sere Talon to the game.
